nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 红尾鵟
nodes.summary: 红尾鵟（Red-tailed hawk，学名 Buteo jamaicensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点。
nodes.shortSummary: 红尾鵟（學名：Buteo jamaicensis）是一種中等體型的猛禽，在美國也被稱爲雞鷹。繁殖於北美廣大地區，從阿拉斯加西部到加拿大北部，最南則可抵達巴拿馬和西印度群島，是北美大陸最爲常見的一種鵟屬鳥，根據外表和分佈地區，可分爲14個亞種。 分佈在北美的鵟屬各種鳥中最大的成員…

nodes.name: 鸟纲

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Unlike some other raptors, the red-tailed hawk is seemingly unfazed by considerable human activity and can nest and live in close proximity to large numbers of humans. Thus, the species can also be found in cities, where common prey such as rock pigeons and brown rats may support their populations. One famous urban red-tailed hawk, known as "Pale Male", became the subject of a nonfiction book, Red-Tails in Love: A Wildlife Drama in Central Park, and is the first known red-tail in decades to successfully nest and raise young in the crowded New York City borough of Manhattan.Pale Male – Introduction – Red-tailed Hawk in New York City |Nature

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Unlike some other raptors, the red-tailed hawk is seemingly unfazed by considerable human activity and can nest and live in close proximity to large numbers of humans. Thus, the species can also be found in cities, where common prey such as rock pigeons and brown rats may support their populations. One famous urban red-tailed hawk, known as "Pale Male", became the subject of a nonfiction book, Red-Tails in Love: A Wildlife Drama in Central Park, and is the first known red-tail in decades to successfully nest and raise young in the crowded New York City borough of Manhattan.Pale Male – Introduction – Red-tailed Hawk in New York City |Nature

links.label: 分布于
